step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester (with CAN VIM) to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch on (IG) and turn the intelligent tester on.
Enter the following menus: DIAGNOSTICS / OBD/MOBD / METER / DTC INFO / CURRENT CODES.
Connect the intelligent tester (with CAN VIM) to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch on (IG) and turn the intelligent tester on.
Enter the following menus: DIAGNOSTICS / OBD/MOBD / METER / DTC INFO / CURRENT CODES.
Erase DTCs by pressing the YES button on the tester.
